briefdescription.para: ADS1299 timing constants Assuming an internal clock of 2.048 MHz.
Default DMA chunk duration in milliseconds.

detaileddescription.para: At 250SPS this yields 25 samples per chunk (675 bytes per DMA buffer). Override via ads1299_continuous_config_t.chunk_duration_ms.
Driver allocates ADS1299_RING_BUF_SLOTS * chunk_bytes of memory at start_continuous().

briefdescription.para: ADS1299 SPI Command Opcodes (Datasheet Table 12) These are fixed single-byte or multibyte protocol bytes.
Configuration Enums for Type Safety Matching the exact bit shifts required by the registers.

detaileddescription.para: Data Output Rates (CONFIG1 Register Bits [2:0]) For EEG, 250 or 500 SPS are standard to reduce ambient noise.

briefdescription.para: Programmable Gain Amplifier (PGA) Settings (CHxSET Register Bits [6:4]) EEG signals are tiny (~10-100uV), so you'll usually want a high gain like 12 or 24.
Channel Input Mux Options (CHxSET Register Bits [2:0]).
